signals.headline: **Peru General Election**: Runoff tomorrow (April 19)
signals.raw:
**Peru General Election**: Runoff tomorrow (April 19). JNE (Peru's electoral body) confirmed candidate lists and no fraud probes today (via El Comercio, Andina agency at 10:45 PM UTC). Front-runners Fujimori (48%) vs. López (42%) per Ipsos flash poll—markets unmoved (PeruBet odds steady).

All checked via real-time sources; nothing "just confirmed/announced/resolved" in last 60 mins to spike volat
matched_markets: Peru General Election invalidated by June 30?

signals.headline: **US Election (Trump-related)**: Latest wires (Reuters, AP, Bloomberg as of 11 PM UTC) report no new polls, indictments,
signals.raw: **US Election (Trump-related)**: Latest wires (Reuters, AP, Bloomberg as of 11 PM UTC) report no new polls, indictments, or campaign announcements today. Trump rally in Pennsylvania ended ~2 hours ago with standard rhetoric—no endorsements, VP picks, or legal resolutions. PredictIt/PolyMarket odds stable (Trump ~52% for 2024 win).

signals.headline: **"Gold Cards"**: No updates on rumored Trump "gold card" immigration/golden visa policy
signals.raw: **"Gold Cards"**: No updates on rumored Trump "gold card" immigration/golden visa policy. Last mention was April 15 X post by Trump advisor—no official confirmation or White House response today.
matched_markets: How many Gold Cards will Trump sell this year?
